title: TradeTracker
description: That automatically tracks and analyzes all Villager and Wandering Trader trades, calculating emerald profit/loss in real-time with a detailed trade history and HUD overlay.
body:
# TradeTracker

**Track every trade. Know every profit. Master the emerald economy!**

This client-side Fabric mod automatically tracks and analyzes all your Villager and Wandering Trader trades, calculating emerald profit and loss in real-time with a detailed history and HUD overlay.

## Features

### Trade Tracking
- **Automatic detection** - Every trade with Villagers and Wandering Traders is recorded instantly
- **Emerald calculation** - Real-time profit/loss per trade using 100+ item value mappings
- **Session management** - Start, pause, and resume tracking sessions with a single keybind
- **Session persistence** - Optionally save sessions across world closes

### HUD Overlay
- **Full mode** - Detailed stats: total trades, balance, best/worst trades, daily count
- **Compact mode** - Clean one-line summary with balance and trade count
- **Flash effects** - Gold flash for big profits, red flash for losses
- **Customizable** - Position, opacity, scale, and visibility all adjustable

### Trade History
- **History screen** - Browse all recorded trades with a dedicated GUI
- **Profession filter** - Filter trades by villager profession with trade counts
- **Smart filters** - View all, profit only, loss only, or last 10 trades
- **Color-coded** - Green for profit, red for loss, gray for neutral trades

### Player-Friendly
- **In-game config** - Full YACL config screen via ModMenu
- **Keybinds** - Dedicated "TradeTracker" category in controls
- **Localization** - English and German language support
- **Client-side only** - No server installation required

## Customization

Configure everything in-game via ModMenu:

**General**
- Toggle mod on/off
- Enable/disable Wandering Trader tracking
- Session persistence on/off

**HUD**
- Position: top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right
- Opacity: 0-100%
- Scale: 50-150%
- Visibility: always visible or only during trading

**Keybinds** (Controls > TradeTracker)
- `T` - Toggle compact HUD mode
- `G` - Open trade history screen
- `J` - Start/pause/resume session
- `R` - Reset session (in history screen)
- `F` - Cycle filters (in history screen)

## Requirements

- **Minecraft**: 26.1+
- **Fabric Loader**: 0.18.4 or higher
- **Fabric API**: Required
- **Java**: 25 or higher
- **ModMenu** + **YACL**: Required (for in-game config screen)

## Perfect For

- **Traders** - Maximize your emerald profits with data-driven insights
- **Builders** - Track how much you spend on building materials from villagers
- **Survival Players** - Keep an eye on your trading economy across sessions
- **Everyone** - Anyone who trades with villagers in Minecraft!

## Links

- **Issues & Bugs**: [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/DennisTheGamer/tradetracker/issues)
- **Source Code**: [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/DennisTheGamer/tradetracker)

---

**Made with love by DennisTheGamer**
